hypotheses_considered.summary: Add one tiny legal anchor2 x-family closed pair before the corrected entry relay. This is earlier than all corrected corridor/splitbookend families and directly tests whether the l8 x-entry benefits from a same-family upstream boundary preconditioner.

Insert a very small anchor3 mixed-beta butterfly before the corrected entry relay, without the old anchor5 far-z seed. Structural reason: the old-basis mirror control may have failed partly because it stacked with the heavier anchor5 mainline; this corrected-entry version isolates the early mixed-beta idea on a cleaner backbone.
Tiny anchor4 front-z conditioner before the corrected entry relay. Still plausible as a contiguous front-corridor preconditioner, but held back behind H1/H2 because old-basis evidence was weaker.
Split a tiny anchor2 boundary pair and anchor3 mirror precursor into one coupled pre-entry bookend. Listed only; not spent until isolated H1/H2 are read out.

selected_families: early x-boundary seed on corrected incumbent backbone
early gateway mirror precursor on corrected incumbent backbone

rows_sorted.rationale: Sign-control companion: positive anchor2 x-boundary seed at reduced 1 s dwell, motivated by the old razor-thin max edge of the positive branch at larger dose.

Dose-down negative anchor2 x-boundary seed before the corrected incumbent entry relay. Chosen because the old-basis negative branch improved mean but hurt max; smaller dose may preserve the coupling while softening max damage.
Dose-up negative anchor2 x-boundary seed on the corrected incumbent backbone.
Minimal corrected-entry mirror precursor: a 1 s flip-sign anchor3 mixed-beta butterfly, now isolated from the old anchor5 far-z mainline.
Slightly stronger corrected-entry mirror precursor at anchor3, still far below the old-basis d4 dose that clearly over-drove mean.

early_x_boundary_seed_on_corrected_entry.rationale: Sign-control companion: positive anchor2 x-boundary seed at reduced 1 s dwell, motivated by the old razor-thin max edge of the positive branch at larger dose.

early_gateway_mirror_precursor_on_correc.rationale: Minimal corrected-entry mirror precursor: a 1 s flip-sign anchor3 mixed-beta butterfly, now isolated from the old anchor5 far-z mainline.

best_candidate.rationale: Sign-control companion: positive anchor2 x-boundary seed at reduced 1 s dwell, motivated by the old razor-thin max edge of the positive branch at larger dose.

kf36_gate_reason: No candidate reached the competitiveness gate.

bottom_line.statement: No new corrected-basis takeover was found. The fresh signal is the anchor2 x-boundary family: its best point `xboundary_l2_pos1_on_entry` reached 1.170 / 0.543 / 5.697 and KF36 rechecked at 1.170 / 0.542 / 5.698, so it stayed only 0.017 mean and 0.014 max behind the splitbookend runner-up while still beating corrected anchor5 on all three overall metrics. By contrast, the isolated anchor3 mirror-precursor family degraded sharply and is not competitive under corrected att0.
